summary: Auth blocker fixed - profile creation and meditation session access verified. TTS settings persist and voice output can be enabled.

steps.evidence: Onboarding bypassed, home page shows 'Begin meditation session' button

steps.step: Verify TTS Voice dropdown shows 6 options
steps.evidence: en-US-GuyNeural, en-US-ChristopherNeural, en-US-BrianNeural, en-GB-ThomasNeural, en-US-JennyNeural, en-US-MichelleNeural
evidence/fix-auth-blocker/voice-output-enabled.png - 'Voice output enabled' button shows pressed state

notes: Auth middleware fix verified - POST /api/profile now works without auth token
Backend required restart to pick up code changes from commit 59adb57
TTS settings section exists with all 6 curated voices
Voice output can be enabled in meditation session
TTS settings are persisted via PUT /api/settings
Full voice playback verification (confirming actual voice used) requires manual audio testing
frictions: Browser automation had difficulty with React select element - select command returned success but value didn't visually update in snapshot
Backend server needed restart to pick up auth middleware fix
